commit.subject: LU-19376 tests: skip sanity/60g for older servers
commit.message:
LU-19376 tests: skip sanity/60g for older servers

This patch skips sanity/60g for older servers that
do not have the fast symlink xattr fix.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity env=ONLY=60g serverversion=2.15

Fixes: d0c75da78301 ("LU-19121 ldiskfs: check fast symlink for ea_inode correctly")
Change-Id: I7a2a21f89adc41da0801137103a39d279165f830
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62026
Reviewed-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Li Dongyang <dongyangli@ddn.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
